description: There's a faint rattling noise from the front end of the Bullet above 40 km/h. Started about a week ago.
I stopped getting the 'charging complete' push-style notifications in the bell icon a few days ago, even though sessions are finishing normally.
My card was charged twice for the same Home Charger order — order IDs look identical except for the timestamp. Please refund the duplicate.
Port 2 at the Kadıköy Supercharger won't initiate a session, just blinks red. Tried three times with two different cables.
I'd like to request a refund for the Premium Tire Set I ordered — wrong size was shipped for my Vector. Order confirmation attached to my account.
The Maslak station shows as AC on the map but it's actually a DC fast charger when I arrived. Might mislead people planning a quick top-up.
I ordered a Bullet Weatherproof Motorcycle Cover two weeks ago and the order still shows as processing. Can someone check the shipping status?
My Bullet motorcycle disappeared from 'My Vehicles' after I updated my profile phone number. Cloud is still showing fine.
adminReply: This has been restored on our end — it was an ownership sync glitch tied to a specific update path that's now patched. Please refresh and confirm both vehicles show up.

description: My Vector stopped charging at 60% overnight on the home charger. The app still shows it as charging but the battery percentage hasn't moved in 3 hours.
adminReply: Thanks for the report — this was a known sync issue with the home charging session tracker that we've since fixed. Please try starting a new session; if it happens again let us know the vehicle ID.

description: Charging at home is taking almost twice as long as the estimate shown in the app for the same target percentage.
adminReply: We adjusted the home charging time estimate formula to better reflect real wallbox throughput — should be much closer to accurate now. Let us know if the next session still feels off.

description: Would love to see a dark map style option for the charging station view to match the rest of the dashboard's dark theme.
adminReply: Great suggestion — passed along to the product team for a future update. Thanks for the feedback!

description: A session at Beşiktaş showed 42 kWh delivered but I was only charged for what looks like about half that. Not complaining, just flagging in case it's a bug on your end.
adminReply: Confirmed a rounding bug in the cost calculation for sessions over 40 kWh — fixed now. Thanks for flagging it, no action needed on your side.
